summary: Comprehensive testing of dark/light theme system across all 8 dashboard pages. Theme toggle works correctly, persists in localStorage, and maintains state across navigation. All dashboard components render correctly in both themes.

issues: Some chart content appears faded/invisible during page transition - likely due to Recharts ResponsiveContainer dimension warnings

critical_code_review_comments: ThemeContext implementation is clean and follows React best practices
CSS variables properly defined for both dark and light themes in index.css
Theme toggle animation using Framer Motion is smooth
All dashboard components correctly use themeUtils.js for consistent styling
Minor: Recharts ResponsiveContainer shows dimension warnings during page transitions - not a blocking issue
seed_data_creation: N/A - All data hardcoded in components
context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme system fully implemented and working. Dark/light toggle in sidebar bottom, persists in localStorage. All 8 dashboard pages (Overview, Market, Tuning, Alerts, Reports, Teams, Tenants) plus ECU Knowledge Bot tested in both themes. CSS variables: --d-bg, --d-surface, --d-surface-alt, --d-text, --d-text-sec, --d-text-mut, --d-text-dim, --d-border, --d-border-sub, --d-hover, --d-chart-grid, --d-chart-tick, --d-shadow, --d-tooltip-bg. Noise overlay hidden in light mode. Minor Recharts dimension warnings during navigation (cosmetic, not functional issue).
